revision.comment: Bot: mark 4 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24618454543|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:温泉入浴指導員]] {{Citation needed|date=2022-12-15}} '''Onsen-​nyūyoku Shidōin''' (温泉入浴指導員) is a qualification awarded to individuals who complete a course conducted by the {{ill|Japan Health Development Foundation|de|Japanische Stiftung für Gesundheitsentwicklung|ja|一般財団法人日本健康開発財団|zh|日本健康开发财团|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japan Health Development Foundation|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Holders instruct bathers in health-promotion programs utilizing {{ill|Onsen|en|Onsen|qid=Q655311|lt=hot spring|1=Onsen}} use and oversee safety management of hot spring facilities. == Roles of Onsen-​nyūyoku Shidōin == * Provide bathers with instruction on proper general usage of hot springs and guidance for a healthy lifestyle. * Manage facility safety and carry out emergency life-saving procedures in the event of accidents. * Conduct regular training for hot spring facility employees on safety management and first aid. == Program Overview == Established in 2003 by the {{ill|Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|en|Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|qid=Q1191238|lt=Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|1=Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare}}, this qualification requires attendance at a two-day training course organized by the Japan Health Development Foundation. There are no prerequisites for enrollment. The curriculum covers five subjects: # {{ill|health science|de|Gesundheitswissenschaft|ja|健康学|zh|健康学|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/health science|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135579071}} (foundations of health-promotion medicine) # {{ill|thermal physiology|de|Thermophysiologie|ja|温熱生理学|zh|热生理学|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/thermal physiology|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135579075}} (hot spring environment and health) # {{ill|balneology|de|Balneologie|ja|温泉医学|zh|温泉医学|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/balneology|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135579080}} (general and specialized topics in hot spring medicine, including {{ill|rehabilitation|de|Rehabilitation|ja|リハビリテーション|zh|康复|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/rehabilitation|1=rehabilitation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2795791}}) # Bathing program instruction practicum # {{ill|lifesaving course|de|Lebensrettungskurs|ja|救命講習|zh|救生课程|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lifesaving course|1=First Aid Training|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11499234}} (with practical training in {{ill|First aid|en|First aid|qid=Q133981|lt=first aid|1=First aid}} and {{ill|Cardiopulmonary resuscitation|en|Cardiopulmonary resuscitation|qid=Q185325|lt=cardiopulmonary resuscitation|1=Cardiopulmonary resuscitation}}) Placement of an Onsen-​nyūyoku Shidōin is mandatory in Ministry-certified {{ill|hot spring program–type health promotion facilities|de|Thermalquellenprogramm-Gesundheitsförderungseinrichtungen|ja|温泉利用プログラム型健康増進施設|zh|温泉利用项目型健康促进设施|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hot spring program–type health promotion facilities|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135579083}}. {| class="wikitable" ! Item !! {{ill|Hot Spring Bathing Instructor|ja|温泉入浴指導員|1=Hot Spring Bathing Instructor|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Bathing Instructor|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Bathing Instructor|qq=}} (温泉入浴指導員) !! {{ill|Hot Spring Utilization Instructor|ja|温泉利用指導者|1=Hot Spring Utilization Instructor|1qq=Hot Spring Instructor|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Utilization Instructor|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Utilization Instructor|qq=}} (温泉利用指導者) |- ! Purpose & target users | General bathers—guides healthy-use programs for any visitor. | Medically prescribed bathers—follows a physician’s treatment order. |- ! Training duration | 2 days | 8 days |- ! Prerequisites | None | Must already be a public health nurse, registered dietitian, health exercise instructor, four-year physical education graduate, etc. |- ! Qualification level | Basic qualification | Advanced qualification (above Onsen-nyūyoku Shidōin) |- ! Core curriculum | * Health science basics * Thermal-physiology * Balneology * Bathing-program practicum * Lifesaving course (first aid & CPR) | * Health science * Balneology * Thermal-physiology & therapy * First aid & CPR |- ! Facility designation | Placement required in Ministry-certified “hot spring program–type health promotion facilities.” | Placement required in Ministry-certified “hot spring utilization–type health promotion facilities.” |- ! Category tags | Required-placement qualification | Required-placement qualification;
Medical qualification |} * * == External links == * [http://www.jph-ri.or.jp/guide/shidouin.html] == See also == * {{ill|Onsen|en|Onsen|qid=Q655311|lt=hot spring|1=Onsen}} * {{ill|Balneotherapy|en|Balneotherapy|qid=Q2016490|lt=balneotherapy|1=Balneotherapy}} * {{ill|Onsen-riyo Shidōsha|de|Onsen-Nutzungsinstruktor|ja|温泉利用指導者|1=Hot Spring Utilization Instructor|zh|温泉利用指导者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen-riyo Shidōsha|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Utilization Instructor|qq=}} {{Onsen-stub}} {{Onsen}} {{translated page|ja|温泉入浴指導員|version=92912848|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:温泉入浴指導員]] [[de:Onsen-nyūyoku Shidōin]] {{wikidata link|Q11562930}} [[Category:Hot_springs_of_Japan]] [[Category:Mandatory qualifications]] [[Category:Onsens]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Pages with deleted QID in ill template]]
